manifest.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# GTM Pipeline Q2 Review

PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

This package contains the signed ANIP behavior contract, recommended lock file, and tooling metadata for agent integration.
Custom implementation code is not embedded in the behavior contract unless it is explicitly attached as implementation material.

Project: gtm-pipeline-q2-review
Package: gtm-pipeline-q2-review@0.4.1
Services: 4 (gtm-pipeline-service, gtm-enrichment-service, gtm-prioritization-service, gtm-outreach-service)
Capabilities: 23 (gtm.pipeline_summary, gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary, gtm.stage_bottleneck_summary, gtm.sales_team_performance_summary, gtm.product_pipeline_summary, gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan, gtm.stalled_opportunity_review, gtm.account_risk_summary, gtm.prepare_followup_tasks, gtm.account_enrichment_summary, gtm.lookalike_accounts, gtm.at_risk_account_enrichment_summary, ...)

## Generate

From a downloaded package bundle:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json --target python --dependency-source local --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

From a trusted registry package:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1 --target python --dependency-source registry --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

## Verify

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --definition anip-service-definition.json
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1
```

manifest.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# GTM Pipeline Q2 Review

PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

This package contains the signed ANIP behavior contract, recommended lock file, and tooling metadata for agent integration.
Custom implementation code is not embedded in the behavior contract unless it is explicitly attached as implementation material.

Project: gtm-pipeline-q2-review
Package: gtm-pipeline-q2-review@0.4.1
Services: 4 (gtm-pipeline-service, gtm-enrichment-service, gtm-prioritization-service, gtm-outreach-service)
Capabilities: 23 (gtm.pipeline_summary, gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary, gtm.stage_bottleneck_summary, gtm.sales_team_performance_summary, gtm.product_pipeline_summary, gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan, gtm.stalled_opportunity_review, gtm.account_risk_summary, gtm.prepare_followup_tasks, gtm.account_enrichment_summary, gtm.lookalike_accounts, gtm.at_risk_account_enrichment_summary, ...)

## Generate

From a downloaded package bundle:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json --target python --dependency-source local --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

From a trusted registry package:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1 --target python --dependency-source registry --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

## Verify

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --definition anip-service-definition.json
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1
```

project.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review
project.summary: PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

linked_product_design_items.label: Approval Posture Summary
linked_product_design_items.detail: Direct reads are allowed when scoped; high-risk follow-up task and reassignment preparation must produce a preview and stop for approval before downstream execution.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Leader approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Can approve governed follow-up, reassignment, and routing preparation when an approval grant is required.

linked_product_design_items.label: RevOps Manager approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Write-adjacent requests must stop at approval_required for a sales leader or equivalent approver.

linked_product_design_items.label: East Account Manager approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Operational changes must stop at approval_required before downstream mutation.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Analyst approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Cannot approve or prepare governed downstream actions.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Leader · Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Bounded Result · Return scoped summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export.

linked_product_design_items.label: Rev Ops Manager · Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Bounded Result · Return scoped summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export.

linked_product_design_items.label: Account Manager East · Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Bounded Result · Return scoped East-region summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Analyst · Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Bounded Result · Return bounded or masked read-only summaries where policy permits.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Leader · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approval Required · Approval Stop · Prepare a preview and stop before downstream mutation unless an explicit approval grant is issued.

linked_product_design_items.label: Rev Ops Manager · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approval Required · Approval Stop · Prepare a preview and stop before any downstream mutation.

linked_product_design_items.label: Account Manager East · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approval Required · Approval Stop · Prepare a scoped preview and stop before any downstream mutation.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Analyst · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Denied · Deny Request · Deny governed preparation, routing, and downstream mutation requests.

sections.label: Data Contracts
sections.description: The governed data surface, metrics, dimensions, filters, outcomes, and result-shaping rules.

linked_product_design_items.label: Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: A bounded summary of pipeline health for a quarter and scope.

linked_product_design_items.label: Account Risk
linked_product_design_items.detail: An explainable ranking of open accounts that need attention.

linked_product_design_items.label: Follow-up Plan
linked_product_design_items.detail: A prepared set of recommended tasks that still requires approval before downstream execution.

linked_product_design_items.label: Reassignment Plan
linked_product_design_items.detail: A prepared set of reassignment recommendations that still requires approval before downstream execution.

linked_product_design_items.label: Account Enrichment
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded firmographic and account context for approved accounts.

linked_product_design_items.label: Lookalike Account
linked_product_design_items.detail: An account similar to an approved reference account with explainable similarity signals.

linked_product_design_items.label: Lead Score
linked_product_design_items.detail: A bounded score band and reason-code summary for a lead or account.

linked_product_design_items.label: Account Priority
linked_product_design_items.detail: An explainable ordering of accounts for GTM action.

linked_product_design_items.label: Routing Plan
linked_product_design_items.detail: A prepared routing recommendation that requires approval before mutation.

linked_product_design_items.label: Outreach Draft
linked_product_design_items.detail: Draft-only outreach content generated from approved context.

linked_product_design_items.label: Follow-up Content
linked_product_design_items.detail: Suggested follow-up messaging content that remains review-only.

linked_product_design_items.label: Objection Response
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded response variants using approved claims and account context.

linked_product_design_items.label: Governed Behavior Summary
linked_product_design_items.detail: Return bounded service-specific outputs, ask for missing quarter, account scope, ranking basis, or audience context, deny broad raw exports, preserve service handoff boundaries, and preserve approval stops for write-adjacent work.

linked_product_design_items.label: Do not expose broad raw row-level CRM exports.
linked_product_design_items.detail: The first release is a bounded summary and preparation workflow, not a data extraction tool.

linked_product_design_items.label: Do not execute follow-up tasks or reassignment changes without explicit approval.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Write-adjacent GTM actions must remain preview-and-approve in the governed contract.

linked_product_design_items.label: Do not guess missing quarter, pipeline scope, or ranking basis.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Ambiguous operational requests should clarify instead of silently choosing defaults.

linked_product_design_items.label: Bounded pipeline and account-risk questions return useful answers with evidence.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Regression questions for pipeline summary, forecast, bottlenecks, performance, products, and risk pass.

linked_product_design_items.label: Ambiguous requests ask targeted clarifying questions instead of guessing.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Missing quarter and missing ranking-basis scenarios return clarification outcomes.

linked_product_design_items.label: Unsafe exports are denied and write-adjacent work stops for approval.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Raw export requests deny; follow-up and reassignment flows produce approval-stop previews.

linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Pipeline Service -> Gtm Enrichment Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Pipeline risk outputs may pass bounded account identifiers into enrichment while preserving actor and task lineage.
linked_product_design_items.rationale: Showcase seed review mapped Gtm Pipeline Service -> Gtm Enrichment Service to the Developer Definition audit and lineage controls. The compiled definition requires service handoff tracking, parent invocation tracking, cross-service continuity, and reconstruction evidence.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Enrichment Service -> Gtm Prioritization Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approved enrichment summaries may inform prioritization without exposing raw enrichment features.
linked_product_design_items.rationale: Showcase seed review mapped Gtm Enrichment Service -> Gtm Prioritization Service to the Developer Definition audit and lineage controls. The compiled definition requires service handoff tracking, parent invocation tracking, cross-service continuity, and reconstruction evidence.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Prioritization Service -> Gtm Outreach Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approved prioritized accounts may inform draft-only outreach generation without sending messages.
